AI-Forward knowledge

Documentation hub

A source-backed entry point to the repository's architecture, design language, implementation design, proof, security review, and durable project history.

Open Docs Explorer Open audit timeline

System documentation

Architecture source The top-level system structure, contracts, and architectural decisions. View source (.md) Design language source The visual token system, interaction states, accessibility floors, and archetype signature. View source (.md) Docs Explorer design source The accepted grounding, graph, mind-map, and Spatial 3D interaction contract. View source (.md) Implementation proof source The evidence ledger, test oracles, release gates, and known residual risk. View source (.md)

Governance and continuity

Threat model source The current trust boundaries, mitigations, accepted risks, and security evidence. View source (.md) Project memory source The chronological record of material decisions and learnings that must survive sessions. View source (.md) Skill catalog source The repository's workflow surface and the purpose of each AI-Forward skill. View source (.md) Audit log guide source The durable activity and decision history, including prompt reuse and change records. View source (.md)
This hub links only to committed, source-backed artifacts. The repository does not currently publish a generated JavaDoc-style API reference; run /document when that code-level reference is required.
Generated for the AI-Forward repository documentation surface.
